description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fedora that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a matrix build job with ubuntu-latest, using both gcc and clang compilers. For each build, use the addnab/docker-run-action to run a Docker container with a fedora:rawhide image, install dependencies, and perform a build and deploy using scripts from the ports/ci/linux-fedora directory. Distinguish between release and daily builds based on the GitHub reference.
